institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Agricultural & Environmental Systems — Sustainable Land & Food Systems
tagline: Cultivate Sustainability — Feed the Future Responsibly
programDescription: The Sustainable Land & Food Systems concentration integrates soil science, crop production, sustainable agriculture, and food systems management. Students gain hands-on experience in sustainable farming practices, precision agriculture, and agroecological research at the University Farm and SFRIC. Graduates are prepared for careers in sustainable agriculture, soil conservation, and food systems planning.

careerOutlook.outlook: Sustainable agriculture is one of the fastest-growing sectors as climate change, soil degradation, and food security concerns drive demand for professionals who can balance productivity with environmental stewardship. NC A&T's 1890 land-grant mission aligns directly with serving small and limited-resource farmers.
